'use strict'; var test = require('tape'); var parse = require('../').parse; test('set env vars', function (t) { t.same( parse('ABC=444 x y z'), ['ABC=444', 'x', 'y', 'z'] ); t.same( parse('ABC=3\\ 4\\ 5 x y z'), ['ABC=3 4 5', 'x', 'y', 'z'] ); t.same( parse('X="7 8 9" printx'), ['X=7 8 9', 'printx'] ); t.same( parse('X="7 8 9"; printx'), ['X=7 8 9', { op: ';' }, 'printx'] ); t.same( parse('X="7 8 9"; printx', function () { t.fail('should not have matched any keys'); }), ['X=7 8 9', { op: ';' }, 'printx'] ); t.end(); });
